name: task-worker
description: HTTP bridge service that accepts signed tasks from Hermes, forwards them to a local OpenClaw gateway, and posts AI results back to Hermes via webhooks.

scripts.check: node --check task-worker.js && node --check routes/search-codebase.js && node --check routes/read-file.js && node --check scripts/code-memory-status.js && node --check scripts/code-repo-manager.js && node --check scripts/sync-and-reindex.js && node --check scripts/reindex-codebase.js && node --check scripts/cleanup-repo-index.js && node --check services/code-memory/config.js && node --check services/code-memory/indexer.js && node --check services/code-memory/search.js && node --check services/code-memory/tools.js && node --check services/security/hmac.js && node --check tools/callCodeSearch.js && node --check tools/callReadFile.js && node --check tools/searchCodebaseCli.js && node --check tools/readFileCli.js && node --check test/hmac.test.js && node --check test/read-file-tool.test.js && node --check test/read-file-route.test.js && python3 -c "import ast,pathlib; ast.parse(pathlib.Path('integrations/hermes/plugins/task-worker-code-tools/__init__.py').read_text())"
